programmes.show_description: Seirbheis còmhla ris an Urramach Calum Macleòid bhon Eaglais Shaor.  Gaelic service conducted by retired Free Church of Scotland minister, Rev Calum MacLeod.
Taghadh de laoidhean is sailm a chaidh a chruinneachadh airson Bliadhna nan Òran. A selection of hymns and psalms selected from the Bliadhna nan Òran/Year of Gaelic Song project.
Taghadh à prògraman na seachdain air a thoirt thugaibh le Michelle NicDhòmhnaill. A selection from the week's programmes with Michelle MacDonald.
Eòghann MacEunraig le taghadh de cheòl na pìoba. Ewen Henderson presents a selection of pipe music.
Tha òrain bho Hannah Rarity, Kingfishr agus tòrr eile san taghadh aig Mairead NicIllinnein. Songs from Hannah Rarity, Kingfishr and many more appear in Mairead's playlist today.
Podcast do luchd-ionnsachaidh ceangailte ris an t-sreath SpeakGaelic air BBC ALBA. Weekly podcast for Gaelic learners, accompanying the BBC ALBA series SpeakGaelic.
Litir Bheag na seachdain sa le Ruairidh MacIlleathain. Litir àireamh 1086. This week's short letter for Gàidhlig learners.
Podcast do luchd-ionnsachaidh na Gàidhlig ceangailte ris an t-sreath SpeakGaelic air BBC ALBA. Weekly podcast for Gaelic learners to accompany the BBC ALBA series SpeakGaelic.
Litir do Luchd-ionnsachaidh le Ruairidh MacIlleathain. Litir àireamh 1390. Roddy Maclean reads this week's letter for Gàidhlig learners.
Prògram de cheòl Ceilteach ùr à Alba is Èirinn.  New Celtic music from Scotland and Ireland.
Seirbheis còmhla ris an Urramach Calum Macleòid bhon Eaglais Shaor.  Gaelic service conducted by retired Free Church of Scotland minister, Rev Calum MacLeod.
Prògram a tasglann Fàilte air a' Bhaile. Thadhail Aonghas Dòmhnallach air Aiginis san Rubha ann an 1985. Fàilte air a Bhaile in Aiginish, Point in1985 from the BBC archive.
Tha BBC Radio nan Gaidheal mar BBC Radio Alba. BBC Radio nan Gaidheal joins BBC Radio Scotland.
Seirbheis còmhla ri Iain MacSuain, an Leughadair aig Eaglais na h-Alba air an Tairbeart 1996. Service from 1996 with reader the late John MacSween, Church of Scotland, Tarbert.
Taghadh à prògraman na seachdain air a thoirt thugaibh le Michelle NicDhòmhnaill. A selection from the week's programmes with Michelle MacDonald.
Tha BBC Radio nan Gaidheal mar BBC Radio Alba. BBC Radio nan Gaidheal joins BBC Radio Scotland.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach madainn. Local, national and international news each morning.
Agnes Rennie agus Iain MacÌomhair le colbhan beachd bhon deireadh-sheachdain. Guests Agnes Rennie and Iain MacIver review the weekend's newspaper opinion columns.
Tha Linda NicLeòid a' dol gar cuir ann an sunnd le taghadh de dh'òrain agus ceòl traidiseanta Gàidhlig. Linda Macleod presents a great choice of traditional Gaelic music.
Naidheachdan, còmhradh, spòrs, ceòl agus fealla-dhà. News, chat, sport, music and entertainment.
Ceòl Gàidhealach 's Ceilteach agus fiosrachadh air na tha dol agaibhse gach feasgar. Gaelic and Celtic music and a round-up of what's on. Post-d - dethadol@bbc.co.uk.
Tasglan Fàilte air a' Bhaile, thadhal Ruairidh Ian MacLeòid air Olithigh Dhùn Èideann. Roddy John MacLeod visits Edinburgh University in 1985, a programme from the BBC archive.
Cluinnear òrain bho Gretchen Peters, Teddy Thompson, Luke Combs agus Sam Outlaw. A selection of country music old and new.
Naidheachdan nàiseanta is ionadail o Dhiluain gu Dihaoine. National and local news from Monday to Friday.
Ceòl, fealla-dhà agus sùil air spòrs ionadail, nàiseanta agus eadar-nàiseanta. Music and entertainment with Derek Pluto Murray along with his Musical Links. Tweet @DerekPluto.
Ceòl, amaideas 's na beachdan agaibh air cuspairean a' là airson ur cuir ann a sunnd airson na seachdain. Music, opinion and general nonsense to get your week off to a good start.
Naidheachdan, còmhradh, spòrs, ceòl agus fealla-dhà. News, chat, sport, music and entertainment.
Agnes Rennie agus Iain MacÌomhair le colbhan beachd bhon deireadh-sheachdain. Guests Agnes Rennie and Iain MacIver review the weekend's newspaper opinion columns.
Tha BBC Radio nan Gaidheal mar BBC Radio Alba. BBC Radio nan Gaidheal joins BBC Radio Scotland.
